page.title: Working Dirs
page.description: Local directories agents run in. Bind a folder on a daemon machine, optionally to a git repo. Issues pick one of these as their working directory.

form.name: Name
form.local_path_hint: Absolute path on the selected machine.
form.no_daemons: No daemon machines online. Start a daemon first.
form.git_repo_hint: Bind a git repository so agents can branch and open PRs.
form.no_local_daemon: Start the local daemon to choose a folder on this machine.
form.web_unsupported: Folder picking is only available in the desktop app.
form.picked_hint: Name is taken from the folder; it runs on this machine.

delete.title: Delete working dir?
delete.body: This removes the directory binding. Issues that referenced it keep their history but lose the link.
